tweets.name: Paul Graham
tweets.text: If you skip some or all of college to start a startup, it's on you to develop your mind the way college would have. And that's not something that happens by default in most startups.

tweets.name: Paul Graham
tweets.text: You never need to describe something as a "bad take." If it's false or irrelevant or omits something important, you can just say so. And if it's true, relevant, and complete, it's not a bad take.

tweets.name: Paul Graham

software is
